turns.svg: <svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="80" y="280" width="350" height="100" rx="20" ry="20" fill="#FF0000" /><rect x="130" y="210" width="250" height="70" rx="10" ry="10" fill="#ADD8E6" /><circle cx="170" cy="380" r="40" fill="#000000" /><circle cx="350" cy="380" r="40" fill="#000000" /></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><circle cx="256" cy="256" r="200" fill="#D25625"/><circle cx="150" cy="180" r="30" fill="#8B3A0A" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="350" cy="220" r="40" fill="#8B3A0A" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="280" cy="350" r="25" fill="#8B3A0A" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="200" cy="300" r="20" fill="#8B3A0A" opacity="0.7"/><circle cx="400" cy="150" r="25" fill="#8B3A0A" opacity="0.7"/></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#0077BE"/><g stroke="white" stroke-width="3" fill="none"><path d="M 0 50 Q 100 30 200 50 T 400 50 T 512 50"/><path d="M 0 70 Q 100 50 200 70 T 400 70 T 512 70"/><path d="M 0 90 Q 100 70 200 90 T 400 90 T 512 90"/></g><g><ellipse cx="150" cy="250" rx="30" ry="15" fill="#FFD700"/><polygon points="120,250 100,240 100,260" fill="#FFD700"/><circle cx="175" cy="250" r="3" fill="black"/><ellipse cx="350" cy="300" rx="25" ry="12" fill="#FFA500"/><polygon points="325,300 305,290 305,310" fill="#FFA500"/><circle cx="370" cy="300" r="2" fill="black"/><ellipse cx="250" cy="380" rx="20" ry="10" fill="#87CEEB"/><polygon points="230,380 210,370 210,390" fill="#87CEEB"/><circle cx="265" cy="380" r="2" fill="black"/><path d="M 450 300 C 460 250, 450 200, 450 150" stroke="#228B22" stroke-width="6" fill="none"/><path d="M 80 400 C 90 350, 80 300, 80 250" stroke="#2E8B57" stroke-width="6" fill="none"/></g></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Abstract representation of gentle sound waves -->
  <path d="M 50 256 Q 150 230 256 256 T 460 256" stroke="#aaa" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/>
  <path d="M 50 266 Q 150 240 256 266 T 460 266" stroke="#bbb" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
  <path d="M 50 276 Q 150 250 256 276 T 460 276" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="white"/>
  <!-- Head -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="150" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" fill="#f0e68c"/>

  <!-- Eyes -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="220" r="30" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="310" cy="220" r="30" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="white"/>
  <!-- Pupils -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="220" r="10" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="310" cy="220" r="10" fill="black"/>

  <!-- Eyebrows (slightly raised/anxious) -->
  <path d="M 170 180 Q 200 170 230 180" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 280 180 Q 310 170 340 180" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Mouth (tense line) -->
  <path d="M 220 280 Q 260 290 300 280" stroke="black" stroke-width="4" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Sweat drops -->
  <circle cx="180" cy="150" r="10" fill="#add8e6" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="140" r="10" fill="#add8e6" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="330" cy="150" r="10" fill="#add8e6" stroke="black" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Storm cloud -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="180" rx="180" ry="120" fill="#37474F"/>
  <!-- Lightning bolt -->
  <polyline points="256,100 230,160 270,190 240,230 280,260 250,300 290,330 260,370 300,410" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="14" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Rocket Body -->
  <path d="M 256 50 L 200 150 L 312 150 Z" fill="#cccccc"/> <!-- Nose Cone -->
  <rect x="200" y="150" width="112" height="150" fill="#cccccc"/> <!-- Main Body -->
  <polygon points="200,300 170,350 200,350" fill="#cccccc"/> <!-- Left Fin -->
  <polygon points="312,300 342,350 312,350" fill="#cccccc"/> <!-- Right Fin -->

  <!-- Exhaust Flame -->
  <!-- Outer layer (red) -->
  <path d="M 256 350 C 230 380, 230 420, 256 450 C 282 420, 282 380, 256 350 Z" fill="#ff0000"/>
  <!-- Middle layer (orange) -->
  <path d="M 256 350 C 245 370, 245 400, 256 420 C 267 400, 267 370, 256 350 Z" fill="#ffa500"/>
  <!-- Inner layer (yellow) -->
  <path d="M 256 350 C 250 360, 250 380, 256 390 C 262 380, 262 360, 256 350 Z" fill="#ffff00"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><!-- Background --><rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="200" fill="#87CEEB"/><!-- Sky --><rect x="0" y="200" width="512" height="312" fill="#556B2F"/><!-- Ground --><!-- Wheat Field --><g id="wheat-field"><line x1="80" y1="500" x2="70" y2="300" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="120" y1="480" x2="115" y2="280" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="160" y1="510" x2="150" y2="310" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="200" y1="490" x2="190" y2="290" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="240" y1="500" x2="230" y2="300" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="280" y1="480" x2="270" y2="280" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="320" y1="510" x2="310" y2="310" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="360" y1="490" x2="350" y2="290" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="400" y1="500" x2="390" y2="300" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="440" y1="480" x2="430" y2="280" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><line x1="480" y1="510" x2="470" y2="310" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="6"/><!-- Add a few shorter ones --><line x1="100" y1="500" x2="95" y2="400" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="5"/><line x1="150" y1="490" x2="145" y2="390" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="5"/><line x1="220" y1="500" x2="215" y2="400" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="5"/><line x1="300" y1="480" x2="295" y2="380" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="5"/><line x1="380" y1="510" x2="375" y2="410" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="5"/><line x1="460" y1="490" x2="455" y2="390" stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="5"/></g><!-- Sickle --><g id="sickle" transform="translate(400, 450) rotate(20)"><path d="M 0 0 C 30 -10 60 -30 80 -60" stroke="#A9A9A9" stroke-width="6" fill="none"/><!-- Blade --><rect x="70" y="-60" width="15" height="40" fill="#8B4513" rx="3"/></g><!-- Handle --></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <path d="M 50 450 Q 150 300 250 400 Q 350 500 450 350 Q 480 200 400 150 Q 300 100 200 250" stroke="gray" stroke-width="10" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect x="156" y="156" width="200" height="200" fill="#4CAF50"/><rect x="156" y="156" width="40" height="40" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect x="196" y="156" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="236" y="156" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="276" y="156" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="316" y="156" width="40" height="40" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect x="156" y="196" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="196" y="196" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="236" y="196" width="40" height="40" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect x="276" y="196" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="316" y="196" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="156" y="236" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="196" y="236" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="236" y="236" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="276" y="236" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="316" y="236" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="156" y="276" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="196" y="276" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="236" y="276" width="40" height="40" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect x="276" y="276" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="316" y="276" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="156" y="316" width="40" height="40" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect x="196" y="316" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="236" y="316" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="276" y="316" width="40" height="40" fill="#000000"/><rect x="316" y="316" width="40" height="40" fill="#87CEEB"/></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Money bag -->
  <path d="M 130 400 Q 130 350 180 350 L 330 350 Q 380 350 380 400 Z" fill="#8B4513" stroke="#5A2E0E" stroke-width="4"/>
  <!-- Top opening of the bag -->
  <path d="M 180 350 Q 256 330 330 350" fill="none" stroke="#5A2E0E" stroke-width="4"/>
  <!-- Drawstrings -->
  <line x1="180" y1="340" x2="160" y2="320" stroke="#5A2E0E" stroke-width="4"/>
  <line x1="330" y1="340" x2="350" y2="320" stroke="#5A2E0E" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- Coins peeking out -->
  <circle cx="190" cy="330" r="30" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#B8860B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="220" cy="320" r="28" fill="#E6C000" stroke="#B8860B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="315" r="26" fill="#CCAA00" stroke="#B8860B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="280" cy="325" r="25" fill="#B39400" stroke="#B8860B" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Background Sky -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#87CEEB"/>

  <!-- Ground -->
  <rect y="400" width="512" height="112" fill="#A9A9A9"/>

  <!-- Mount Fuji -->
  <polygon points="100,300 412,300 256,100" fill="#FFFFFF"/>

  <!-- Tokyo Tower -->
  <!-- Base Platform -->
  <rect x="220" y="380" width="72" height="20" fill="#A9A9A9"/>
  <!-- Main Structure - simplified bands -->
  <rect x="235" y="180" width="42" height="40" fill="#E53935"/> <!-- Red -->
  <rect x="235" y="220" width="42" height="40" fill="#FFFFFF"/> <!-- White -->
  <rect x="235" y="260" width="42" height="40" fill="#E53935"/> <!-- Red -->
  <rect x="235" y="300" width="42" height="40" fill="#FFFFFF"/> <!-- White -->
  <rect x="235" y="340" width="42" height="40" fill="#E53935"/> <!-- Red -->
  <!-- Top Spire -->
  <polygon points="256,150 245,180 267,180" fill="#E53935"/>

  <!-- Cherry Blossoms -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="120" r="8" fill="#FFB6C1"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="130" r="7" fill="#FFB6C1"/>
  <circle cx="200" cy="160" r="9" fill="#FFB6C1"/>
  <circle cx="300" cy="170" r="6" fill="#FFB6C1"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#000"/><circle cx="256" cy="256" r="30" fill="#FFF"/><g stroke-linecap="butt"><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="256" y2="50" stroke="#FF0000" stroke-width="25"/><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="256" y2="462" stroke="#00FF00" stroke-width="25"/><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="50" y2="256" stroke="#0000FF" stroke-width="25"/><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="462" y2="256" stroke="#FFFF00" stroke-width="25"/><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="50" y2="50" stroke="#FFA500" stroke-width="25"/><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="462" y2="50" stroke="#FF00FF" stroke-width="25"/><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="50" y2="462" stroke="#00FFFF" stroke-width="25"/><line x1="256" y1="256" x2="462" y2="462" stroke="#800080" stroke-width="25"/></g></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="0" y="400" width="512" height="112" fill="#757575"/><rect x="181" y="350" width="150" height="50" fill="#8D6E63"/><rect x="186" y="300" width="140" height="50" fill="#8D6E63"/><rect x="191" y="250" width="130" height="50" fill="#8D6E63"/></svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Hourglass Glass Outline -->
  <path d="M 256 100 L 180 180 L 180 280 L 256 320 L 332 280 L 332 180 Z" fill="none" stroke="black" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- Sand -->
  <!-- Top sand -->
  <path d="M 256 110 L 210 170 L 220 180 L 292 180 L 302 170 Z" fill="sandybrown"/>
  <!-- Bottom sand -->
  <path d="M 256 230 L 220 220 L 210 250 L 302 250 L 292 220 Z" fill="sandybrown"/>
  <!-- Falling sand dots -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="190" r="5" fill="sandybrown"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="200" r="4" fill="sandybrown"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="210" r="3" fill="sandybrown"/>
</svg>

<svg width="512" height="512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Central explosion of broken lines -->
  <path d="M 250 250 L 300 200 L 280 220" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 250 L 200 200 L 220 180" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 250 L 300 300 L 320 280" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 250 L 200 300 L 180 320" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 250 L 250 200 L 270 180" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 250 L 250 300 L 230 320" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 250 L 200 250 L 180 270" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 250 250 L 300 250 L 320 230" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Scattered fragments (polygons) -->
  <polygon points="50,50 80,70 60,90" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="450,100 480,120 460,130" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="100,450 130,480 110,460" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="400,450 430,480 410,460" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="200,50 230,80 210,60" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="300,50 330,80 310,60" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="50,200 80,230 60,210" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="450,300 480,330 460,310" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="350,400 380,430 360,410" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <polygon points="150,300 180,330 160,310" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Overlapping jagged lines -->
  <path d="M 20 20 L 100 100 L 50 150 L 150 200 L 100 250 L 200 300" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 500 50 L 400 100 L 450 150 L 350 200 L 400 250 L 300 300" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 20 500 L 100 400 L 50 350 L 150 300 L 100 250 L 200 200" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M 500 500 L 400 400 L 450 350 L 350 300 L 400 250 L 300 200" stroke="black" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Scattered dots -->
  <circle cx="30" cy="30" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="480" cy="480" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="500" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="500" cy="250" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="20" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="20" cy="250" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="400" cy="400" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="350" r="4" fill="black"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="150" r="4" fill="black"/>
</svg>
